questionHtml:
Which term in the expression ΔG⦵ = ΔH⦵ − TΔS⦵ is an indirect measure of the entropy change of the surroundings when divided by T?

A.  ΔG⦵

B.  ΔH⦵

C.  ΔS⦵

D.  −TΔS⦵

meta.title: Which term in the expression ΔG⦵ = ΔH⦵ − TΔS⦵ is an indirect measure of the entropy change of the surroundings when divided by T? A. ΔG⦵ B. ΔH⦵ C. ΔS⦵ D. −TΔS⦵
